sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Nullable(Int32)));
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values) VALUES (1, [1, null, 3, 11, 12, null, null, 5, 6, null]), (2, [null, null, 2, 8, null, 11, 13]), (3, [7, null, 0, null]), (4, []);
SELECT id, arrayFill(x -> -x, values) AS res FROM test_array WHERE id > 0;
SELECT id, arrayFill(x -> not isNull(x), values) AS filled_values FROM test_array HAVING filled_values[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (SELECT count() FROM test_array t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id AND -t2.values[2] IS NOT NULL) AS cnt FROM test_array t1 GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, arrayFill(x -> isNull(x), values) AS null_filled FROM test_array ORDER BY id DESC;

SELECT id, (SELECT sum(-t3.value) FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(values) AS value FROM test_array t3 WHERE t3.id = t1.id) AS subquery) AS total_negated FROM test_array t1 GROUP BY id HAVING total_negated < 0;
SELECT id, arrayFill(x -> if(x < 5, -x, x), values) AS modified_values FROM test_array WHERE arrayLength(values) > 0;
SELECT id, arrayFill(x -> -abs(x), values) AS neg_abs_filled FROM test_array GROUP BY id HAVING arrayLength(neg_abs_filled) > 0;
